transcript: Speaker A: 15 interview de chuka hu yaar! sab log improve your English bolke reject kar dete hain. Maine YouTube videos, online courses, yahan tak ki grammar books bhi try kar liye lekin meri English me koi improvement hi nahi aa rahi hai yaar. [I have given 15 interviews, buddy! Everyone rejects me saying 'improve your English'. I tried YouTube videos, online courses, even grammar books, but there is no improvement in my English.] Speaker B: Ravi sach bataun, tum ye sab time waste karna band karo aur SpeakX app use karo. Is app me tum AI teachers ki help se English bolna seekh sakte ho. Aur ye teachers bilkul bhi judge nahi karti. Isse tum interview related kuch bhi pooch sakte ho. Roz 10-15 minute practice karo aur 15-20 dinon me fluent English bolne lag jaoge. [Ravi, stop wasting time and use SpeakX. You can learn English with AI teachers who don't judge. You can ask anything interview-related. Practice 10-15 minutes daily to speak fluently in 15-20 days.] Speaker A: Ye AI mehanga hoga na? [This AI must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Sirf 4 rupee per day me 7 din ka trial le sakte ho. [You can get a 7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day.] Speaker A: Ruko main abhi download karta hu SpeakX app. [Wait, let me download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: 15 interview de chuka hu yaar! [I have given 15 interviews, buddy!] ... Tum SpeakX app kyun nahi use karte? [Why don't you use SpeakX app?] ... sirf 4 rupee per day me 7 din ka trial [7-day trial for just 4 rupees per day]
summary: A man frustrated by repeated job interview rejections due to poor English is advised by his friend to use the SpeakX app. She explains how its non-judgmental AI teachers help practice interview skills, highlighting an affordable 7-day trial for 4 rupees per day.
